briefdescription.para: This function converts XDc_VideoFormat enum to string name.
This function maps InitRunConfig format values to XDc_VideoFormat.

simplesect.para: Maps directly to XDc_VideoFormat enum indices

briefdescription.para: This function applies the user configuration to RunConfig structure.
This is the main function for the application.
This file contains the main application entry point.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Initial version
